Receive the most important news about the biggest international

Reviews.text1: They share love with beautiful pyjamas

card1.heading: Free delivery for orders over £65
card1.brief: "Get complimentary ground shipping on every order. Don t love it? Send it back to us."

card2.heading: 100% Christmas exclusivity
card2.brief: Part of the profits will go directly to a humanitarian project. The adventure can be followed on Instagram or via our newsletter!

card3.heading: Real community of Christmas lovers
card3.brief: Our customer are christmas enthousiast and we share the same details for our christmas

Services.description:
An entire team is standing by to receive your orders this year and
              meet all your needs. In addition to the seriousness with which we
              make our pyjamas, we offer a quality service that is important to
              us in order to guarantee you a pleasant shopping experience with
              us
Services.query: How your order will finance a humanitarian project ?
Services.link: Click here to find out more.

QuickLook.heading: Quick look of our products
QuickLook.description:
We strive to maintain quality in everything we do, here are some
              of our freshly available products for this Christmas

Discovery.heading: Discover our pyjamas
Discovery.description:
The Christmas Fabric has worked hard this year again to bring you
              amazing Christmas pyjamas. Order some for you and your loved ones
              and support a humanitarian project with your order

Item1.heading: Discover all our Christmas pyjamas without looking any further
Item1.brief: The ultimate collection of our latest pyjamas and Christmas clothes for everyone. Unclassified.
Item1.title: Christmas pyjamas

Item2.heading: Perfect for families, large or small
Item2.brief: Find an available pyjama model for your whole family directly. Here every model is available in all ages and sizes. Great for Christmas!
Item2.title: Christmas pyjamas for the whole family

Item3.heading: Our matching designs for you and your partner to wear together
Item3.brief: Find our models of matching pyjamas available for men and women. Available in all sizes. For you and your loved one.
Item3.title: Christmas pyjamas for the whole family

Top.Link2: Your purchase will fund this humanitarian project

Bottom.text1: THE CHRISTMAS FABRIC — WORLDWIDE CHRISTMAS LOVERS

Actions.estimatedDeliveryText: Your package will arrive in 3-5 business days at your pick up location or in the comfort of your home.

Tabs.shippingBullet1: Shipment of your order in less than 24 hours from Monday to Saturday (excluding public holidays)
Tabs.shippingBullet2: Free 5-day tracked delivery from £65, 70€ or $80 purchase (at home)
Tabs.shippingBullet3: Standard tracked delivery 4-5 days at 4,90£ (at home)
Tabs.shippingBullet4: Track your package easily by e-mail and on the website
Tabs.sizeGuideDescription: Our pyjamas have an elastic waistband and will fit you well whatever your waist size. Any doubts? Contact us.
